commit_scope: Add a Form-native oracle-distillation learning floor for summary, NL-to-Form, freq-check, STT, and TTS lanes so actual oracle/native comparisons become training receipts.

commands.command: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/nearest-shape.fk form-stdlib/classifier-eval.fk form-stdlib/choice-receipt.fk form-stdlib/branch-choice-order.fk form-stdlib/choice-receipt-learning.fk form-stdlib/form-freq-check.fk form-stdlib/oracle-distillation-learning.fk form-stdlib/tests/oracle-distillation-learning-band.fk

commands.output: NO-FOURTH oracle-distillation-learning; focused validate.sh proof above included fkwu and returned 4095 with all kernels agreeing.

ci_validation.notes: CI not run yet in this local evidence record.

deploy_validation.notes: No deploy performed by this branch.

phase_gate.reason: Focused Form proof passed locally; PR/CI and deploy freshness remain pending after push.

evidence_refs: docs/coherence-substrate/oracle-distillation-learning.form -> body-readable floor/north-star and next physical proof gaps

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Cells and recipes can represent actual oracle-to-native learning work as native rows and reduce oracle reliance only from successful lower-cost native receipts.
public_endpoints: not-applicable: local Form stdlib proof only
test_flows: Five lanes train as nearest-shape exemplars: summary:nl-to-nl, nl-to-form, freq-check, stt, and tts.
Heldout rows classify 5/5 in the focused Form proof.
Summary, NL-to-Form, and freq-check native receipts reduce oracle budget.
STT and TTS remain teacher-led until real audio quality receipts clear the same floor.
Failed and unknown-lane receipts refuse oracle-budget reduction.
